description_long: This object is a historical-style mortar cannon mounted on a wooden carriage with four wheels. The cannon itself is made of black metal, featuring a thick, short barrel with reinforced rings and a wide muzzle. The wooden carriage is robust, with metal brackets and fittings, and is designed to support the heavy weight of the cannon. The wheels are also wooden with metal rims, allowing for limited mobility. Visible mechanical levers and hooks are attached to the carriage, likely for aiming and securing the cannon. The overall construction suggests a design intended for siege or defensive use, with a focus on durability and stability.
description: A heavy black metal mortar cannon mounted on a sturdy wooden wheeled carriage with metal fittings and mechanical levers.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the black metal cannon barrel and the detailed wooden carriage with metal levers and four wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, circular muzzle of the cannon and the symmetrical arrangement of the wooden carriage and wheels.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, displaying the cannon barrel and carriage details from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the cannon barrel and the structure of the wooden carriage, including the wheel arrangement.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large fixed cannon barrel mounted centrally on the wooden carriage; no additional mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: None visible; the carriage is made of wood with some metal fittings, and the cannon barrel is thick metal but not armored.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; the object is finished in solid black and brown colors.
